classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'Investigator Brochure' in the header and throughout. Contains the standard IB content: physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, human PK parameters, and clinical safety data for the investigational drug BRC-209 (Velagostat).

intervention: BRC-209 (Velagostat) - Selective Tau Aggregation Inhibitor, Oral Tablet, 400 mg QD
summary: This is the initial Investigator Brochure (Edition 1, dated 10 January 2022) for BRC-209 (Velagostat), a selective tau aggregation inhibitor oral tablet under development for Alzheimer's Disease. The document summarizes physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, human pharmacokinetics, and Phase II clinical safety data (n=94, 52 weeks) showing tau PET reduction and favorable safety profile with no ARIA or hepatotoxicity.
content:
BIORCE 
THERAPEUTICS


Calle de Serrano 41 · 28001 Madrid · Spain




Document: Investigator Brochure
Product: BRC-209 (Velagostat)
Edition: 1 — INITIAL
Date: 10 January 2022
CONFIDENTIAL






INVESTIGATOR BROCHURE — BRC-209 (VELAGOSTAT)


Selective Tau Aggregation Inhibitor · Oral Tablet · Alzheimer's Disease Program




1. Summary




Phase II Headline Data (BIORCE-NEU-2020-002, n=94, 52 weeks):

  Tau PET reduction (entorhinal cortex): −31% vs placebo (p=0.003)

  CDR-SB change at 52 weeks: −0.38 points (p=0.08, non-significant at this timepoint)

  Safety: No ARIA, no hepatotoxicity, no serious CNS adverse events



2. Physicochemical Properties




Property
Value


Molecular Formula
C₂₁H₂₁F₃N₄O


Molecular Weight
418.4 g/mol


Primary CYP
CYP2C19 (major), CYP3A4 (minor)


Plasma protein binding
91%


Brain:plasma ratio
~0.3




3. Preclinical Pharmacology


BRC-209 inhibits heparin-induced tau aggregation IC₅₀ = 180 nM. Binds selectively to tau proline-rich region (Kd 22 nM). No significant activity against 58 kinases at 1 µM including GSK-3β, CDK5, MARK2.


In vivo (PS19 tau transgenic mouse, 40 mg/kg PO QD, 6 months): −44% hippocampal AT8+ tau burden (p<0.01); +18% Morris Water Maze improvement (p<0.05).
